name: BNB PLUS CORP.
summary: BNB Plus Corp. is a digital asset treasury (DAT) company that has adopted BNB, the native cryptocurrency of the Binance blockchain ecosystem, as its primary reserve asset. The company seeks to accumulate BNB and generate yield through staking, liquidity providing, and DeFi strategies. It also operates LineaRx, Inc., a subsidiary commercializing proprietary cell-free nucleic acid (DNA and RNA) production solutions for biopharmaceutical and diagnostics markets.
